metadata.description: A Claude-Code-native agent harness: enforcement floor, context compression, structural+episodic memory, and orchestration in one package.

plugins.name: ideal-harness
plugins.description: Control plane around a stateless model: guard (deny-wins policy), compress (cache-safe tool_result compression), memory (code-graph + episodic), orchestrate (task ledger + subagent flow), core (loader/validation/skills).
